topics.summary: The June 3 nationwide local elections and concurrent parliamentary by-elections are in their final days of campaigning. DPK leads polls in most metropolitan races while PPP is rallying conservative base through park Geun-hye stump tours; Seoul, Daegu, Gyeongnam, and Jeonbuk are rated competitive.

evidence_headlines.title: 막 오른 지방선거‥여 '일 잘하는 지방 정부', 야 '정권 독주 견제해야'
[여론M] 보수 결집이라는데 국민의힘 지지율은 제자리‥왜?
"보수 결집 온다, 여당 우세 9~13곳"···여론조사 전문가들이 본 6·3 지방선거 판세

topics.summary: The first-instance verdict in former President Yoon Suk-yeol's insurrection trial is scheduled for May 28, with a concurrent perjury sentencing in the Han Duck-soo trial case; special prosecutors have already filed appeals in related proceedings, and PPP leadership has stated it will issue no official reaction.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 '한덕수 재판 위증' 혐의 이번주 1심 선고
윤석열 내란 재판/전개 – 선고기일 2026년 5월 28일
[내란 1심 선고] '반성없는 윤석열 감형사유 없어‥내란죄 사형해야'

topics.summary: A bill introduced by DPK lawmakers would grant a new special prosecutor authority to drop all charges against President Lee Jae-myung stemming from the previous administration, drawing sharp criticism from the PPP, legal scholars, and even the prosecutor-general's office over separation-of-powers concerns; the DPK has signaled the push will resume after the June 3 elections.

evidence_headlines.title: 정진석 '이재명 공소취소 특검법이 내란'
국힘 '공소취소 특검, 선거 이후 반드시 재추진 될 것'
공소취소와 셀프 사면

topics.summary: Starbucks Korea's May 18 tank-tumbler promotional event triggered a nationwide boycott after critics said it mocked the Gwangju Democratization Movement; PPP leader Jang Dong-hyuk defended those opposing the boycott, characterizing it as DPK election-season agitation, deepening the party's association with 5·18 minimization narratives.

evidence_headlines.title: 장동혁 '스타벅스 논란, 선거용 인민재판이자 죽창가'
장동혁 국민의힘 대표, '스벅 5·18 모독 따지려면 정원오도 사퇴해야'
장동혁 '민주당, 스벅 5·18 정신 훼손 따지려면 송영길·우상호 공천 철회하라'

topics.topic_en: Kim Geun-hye Conviction and Judge Death
topics.topic_ko: 김건희 유죄 판결과 담당 판사 사망
topics.summary: The Seoul High Court sentenced Kim Geun-hye (former President Yoon's wife) to four years in prison for stock manipulation and bribery in late April; the presiding judge Shin Jong-oh was subsequently found dead near the court building in early May, prompting national shock and Supreme Court appeals by both the defense and special prosecutors.

evidence_headlines.title: '김건희 유죄' 항소심 판사 숨진 채 발견
'김건희 항소심 유죄' 신종오 판사 숨진 채 발견… 경찰 '사망 경위 수사'

topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating remains elevated at 54–66% across major pollsters but has edged down several points in May, attributed in part to public unease over the prosecution-dismissal special counsel bill; DPK party support stands at roughly double that of the PPP.

evidence_headlines.title: 이재명 대통령 지지율 61%, 민주당 45%·국민의힘 23%
李 대통령 국정 지지도 53.8% … 민주 42.5% vs 국힘 36.2%

topics.summary: Rebuilding Korea Party leader Cho Guk is contesting the Pyeongtaek-eul parliamentary by-election alongside DPK and PPP candidates in a five-way race; recent polls show Cho narrowly leading in a contest that has become a high-profile test of third-party viability.

evidence_headlines.title: "그래도 여당" "조국 살려야" "토박이 유의동"‥평택을 민심 들어보니
6·3 지방선거와 함께 치러지는 경기 '평택을' 재보궐 선거에서 조국 대표 오차범위 내 1위

topics.topic_en: Korea Export Surge and Economic Rebound
topics.summary: Korea's exports jumped 64.8% year-on-year in the first 20 days of May with semiconductor exports up over 200%, lifting business confidence to a three-and-a-half-year high and providing a favorable economic backdrop for the governing DPK ahead of the local elections.

evidence_headlines.title: KDI 경제전망: 반도체 수출 대폭 증가, 서비스업도 개선되면서 경기 회복세

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
